Session 1 	Session 2
M A R K C O M P L E T E
Next
In this training video Dean is going to hammer home the secret art of storytelling, its importance to the perfect mastermind “dance” and how you can
take your stories and use them in your mastermind to set yourself up as the authority in any given topic. Dean is also going to demonstrate the story
method by giving you an example of one he would use in his $250,000 mastermind with Tony.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Understand that there are 3 pieces to the magical “mastermind dance”.
Understand that the story is meant to get your audience pre‐framed as to why they should listen to what you are about to teach and get
them inspired to pay attention.
Watch and study how Dean delivers his fishing story and replicate it for your event.
